hero.title: Transform anything into
hero.description: Generate professional Lottie animations from text descriptions, reference images, or videos. Powered by OmniLottie — the first multimodal vector animation generator.

prompt.label: Describe your animation
prompt.placeholder: a red heart beating with a gentle pulse animation...
prompt.placeholderImage: add a bouncing animation to this...
prompt.exampleText0: a red heart beating with a gentle pulse animation
prompt.exampleText1: a loading spinner with fading rotating dots
prompt.exampleText2: a rocket launching upward with flame trail
prompt.exampleText3: a waving hand emoji smoothly swaying back and forth
prompt.exampleText4: a sun rising over mountains with rays extending outward
prompt.exampleImageText0: add a bouncing animation to this icon
prompt.exampleImageText1: add a spinning animation to this shape
prompt.exampleImageText3: add a glowing pulse effect to this logo

howItWorks.title: How it works:
howItWorks.description: OmniLottie extends Qwen2.5-VL with a specialized Lottie tokenizer that converts JSON animation files into structured sequences of commands and parameters — shapes, animation functions, and control values. The model generates these parameterized Lottie tokens autoregressively, which are then decoded back into valid Lottie JSON, rendered as scalable vector animations.
